title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama, published on PyPI as `ollama`.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, distributed on npm as `ollama`.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package (`langchain-ollama` on PyPI) for using Ollama models in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for any Ollama model, packaged as a single Docker container.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama, available on Maven Central.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: Ollama Sharp
summary: .NET/C# client for Ollama with async streaming and chat interfaces.

title: ollama-tools
summary: Collection of shell scripts and GitHub Actions to automate Ollama model pulls and benchmarks.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight PyQt6 desktop GUI for chatting with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: haystack-ollama
summary: Deepset Haystack 2.0 integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders.

title: ollama-chatbot-react
summary: Minimal React chatbot example consuming Ollama via the official ollama-js package.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and auto-scaling.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that streams Ollama responses into threads using the official Python client.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Custom n8n node to integrate Ollama models into no-code workflows, published on npm.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir OTP library wrapping Ollama REST API with GenServer-backed process pools.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that brings Ollama models into channels with thread-aware conversations.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Rich terminal UI for Ollama built with Python Textual, supports markdown and syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an Ollama sidebar for local AI-assisted note writing.
